mapper.select: SELECT ADMIN_SEQ , ADMIN_LOGIN_ID , ADMIN_PASSWORD FROM admin WHERE ADMIN_LOGIN_ID = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member_info WHERE MEMBER_DELETED_DTM IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sb_trade_info WHERE DEL_DTM IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM book_club WHERE BOOK_CLUB_DELETED_DT IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member_info WHERE MEMBER_DELETED_DTM IS NULL
AND MEMBER_ST = #{status}
AND MEMBER_NICKNM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND MEMBER_EMAIL LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (MEMBER_NICKNM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR MEMBER_EMAIL LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT TRADE_SEQ , SALE_TITLE , SALE_PRICE , SALE_RG , SALE_ST , BOOK_TITLE , CRT_DTM FROM sb_trade_info WHERE DEL_DTM IS NULL
AND SALE_ST = #{status}
AND SALE_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND BOOK_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND SALE_RG LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (SALE_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR BOOK_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR SALE_RG LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY CRT_DTM DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sb_trade_info WHERE DEL_DTM IS NULL
AND SALE_ST = #{status}
AND SALE_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND BOOK_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND SALE_RG LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (SALE_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR BOOK_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR SALE_RG LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT BOOK_CLUB_SEQ , BOOK_CLUB_NAME , BOOK_CLUB_RG , BOOK_CLUB_MAX_MEMBER , BOOK_CLUB_SCHEDULE , CRT_DTM FROM book_club WHERE BOOK_CLUB_DELETED_DT IS NULL
AND BOOK_CLUB_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND BOOK_CLUB_RG LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (BOOK_CLUB_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR BOOK_CLUB_RG LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY CRT_DTM DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM book_club WHERE BOOK_CLUB_DELETED_DT IS NULL
AND BOOK_CLUB_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND BOOK_CLUB_RG LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (BOOK_CLUB_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR BOOK_CLUB_RG LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT L.LOGIN_INFO_SEQ , L.ADMIN_SEQ , L.LOGIN_DTM , L.LOGIN_IP , L.LOGOUT_DTM , L.LOGOUT_IP , A.ADMIN_LOGIN_ID FROM login_info L INNER JOIN admin A ON L.ADMIN_SEQ = A.ADMIN_SEQ WHERE L.ADMIN_SEQ IS NOT NULL
AND A.ADMIN_LOGIN_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND L.LOGIN_IP LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND CAST(L.LOGIN_DTM AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (A.ADMIN_LOGIN_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR L.LOGIN_IP LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR CAST(L.LOGIN_DTM AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY L.LOGIN_DTM DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM login_info L INNER JOIN admin A ON L.ADMIN_SEQ = A.ADMIN_SEQ WHERE L.ADMIN_SEQ IS NOT NULL
AND A.ADMIN_LOGIN_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND L.LOGIN_IP LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND CAST(L.LOGIN_DTM AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (A.ADMIN_LOGIN_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR L.LOGIN_IP LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR CAST(L.LOGIN_DTM AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT L.LOGIN_INFO_SEQ , L.MEMBER_SEQ , L.LOGIN_DTM , L.LOGIN_IP , L.LOGOUT_DTM , L.LOGOUT_IP , M.MEMBER_NICKNM FROM login_info L INNER JOIN member_info M ON L.MEMBER_SEQ = M.MEMBER_SEQ WHERE L.MEMBER_SEQ IS NOT NULL
AND M.MEMBER_NICKNM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND L.LOGIN_IP LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND CAST(L.LOGIN_DTM AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (M.MEMBER_NICKNM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR L.LOGIN_IP LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR CAST(L.LOGIN_DTM AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY L.LOGIN_DTM DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM login_info L INNER JOIN member_info M ON L.MEMBER_SEQ = M.MEMBER_SEQ WHERE L.MEMBER_SEQ IS NOT NULL
AND M.MEMBER_NICKNM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND L.LOGIN_IP LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND CAST(L.LOGIN_DTM AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (M.MEMBER_NICKNM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR L.LOGIN_IP LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR CAST(L.LOGIN_DTM AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT N.NOTICE_SEQ , N.NOTICE_TITLE , N.NOTICE_PRIORITY , N.ACTIVE , N.VIEW_COUNT , N.CRT_DTM , A.ADMIN_LOGIN_ID FROM notice N LEFT JOIN admin A ON N.ADMIN_SEQ = A.ADMIN_SEQ
AND N.NOTICE_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND N.NOTICE_CONT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (N.NOTICE_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR N.NOTICE_CONT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY N.NOTICE_PRIORITY DESC, N.CRT_DTM DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notice
AND NOTICE_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND NOTICE_CONT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (NOTICE_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR NOTICE_CONT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.update: UPDATE member_info SET MEMBER_ST = #{status} WHERE MEMBER_SEQ = #{seq}
UPDATE member_info SET MEMBER_DELETED_DTM = NOW() WHERE MEMBER_SEQ = #{seq}
UPDATE sb_trade_info SET SALE_ST = #{status} WHERE TRADE_SEQ = #{seq}
UPDATE sb_trade_info SET DEL_DTM = NOW() WHERE TRADE_SEQ = #{seq}
UPDATE book_club SET BOOK_CLUB_DELETED_DT = CURRENT_DATE WHERE BOOK_CLUB_SEQ = #{seq}
mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(crt_dtm, '%Y-%m-%d') as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM member_info WHERE crt_dtm >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL 6 DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(crt_dtm, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(crt_dtm, '%Y-%m-%d') as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM sb_trade_info WHERE crt_dtm >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL 6 DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(crt_dtm, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date

SELECT c.category_nm as name, COUNT(t.trade_seq) as count FROM category c JOIN sb_trade_info t ON c.category_seq = t.category_seq WHERE t.del_dtm IS NULL GROUP BY c.category_nm ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT * FROM member_info WHERE MEMBER_DELETED_DTM IS NULL ORDER BY CRT_DTM DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT trade_seq, sale_title, sale_price, sale_rg, sale_st, book_title, crt_dtm FROM sb_trade_info WHERE DEL_DTM IS NULL ORDER BY CRT_DTM DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT BOOK_CLUB_SEQ, BOOK_CLUB_NAME, BOOK_CLUB_RG, BOOK_CLUB_MAX_MEMBER, BOOK_CLUB_SCHEDULE, CRT_DTM FROM book_club WHERE BOOK_CLUB_DELETED_DT IS NULL ORDER BY CRT_DTM DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT L.LOGIN_INFO_SEQ , L.MEMBER_SEQ , L.LOGIN_DTM , L.LOGIN_IP , L.LOGOUT_DTM , L.LOGOUT_IP , M.MEMBER_NICKNM , M.MEMBER_EMAIL FROM login_info L INNER JOIN member_info M ON L.MEMBER_SEQ = M.MEMBER_SEQ WHERE L.MEMBER_SEQ IS NOT NULL ORDER BY L.LOGIN_DTM DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT L.LOGIN_INFO_SEQ , L.ADMIN_SEQ , L.LOGIN_DTM , L.LOGIN_IP , L.LOGOUT_DTM , L.LOGOUT_IP , A.ADMIN_LOGIN_ID FROM login_info L INNER JOIN admin A ON L.ADMIN_SEQ = A.ADMIN_SEQ WHERE L.ADMIN_SEQ IS NOT NULL ORDER BY L.LOGIN_DTM DESC LIMIT 100
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO login_info (ADMIN_SEQ, LOGIN_DTM, LOGIN_IP) VALUES (#{admin_seq}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{login_ip})
INSERT INTO login_info (MEMBER_SEQ, LOGIN_DTM, LOGIN_IP) VALUES (#{member_seq}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{login_ip})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM banner WHERE is_active = TRUE ORDER BY order_idx ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO banner (title, subtitle, bg_color_from, bg_color_to, btn_text, btn_link, icon_name, order_idx) VALUES (#{title}, #{subtitle}, #{bgColorFrom}, #{bgColorTo}, #{btnText}, #{btnLink}, #{iconName}, (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(order_idx), 0) + 1 FROM banner b))
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM temp_page WHERE PAGE_SEQ = #{pageSeq}

SELECT N.NOTICE_SEQ , N.ADMIN_SEQ , N.NOTICE_TITLE , N.NOTICE_PRIORITY , N.ACTIVE , N.VIEW_COUNT , N.NOTICE_CONT , N.CRT_DTM , A.ADMIN_LOGIN_ID FROM notice N LEFT JOIN admin A ON N.ADMIN_SEQ = A.ADMIN_SEQ ORDER BY N.NOTICE_PRIORITY DESC, N.CRT_DTM DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT N.NOTICE_SEQ , N.ADMIN_SEQ , N.NOTICE_TITLE , N.NOTICE_PRIORITY , N.ACTIVE , N.VIEW_COUNT , N.NOTICE_CONT , N.CRT_DTM , A.ADMIN_LOGIN_ID FROM notice N LEFT JOIN admin A ON N.ADMIN_SEQ = A.ADMIN_SEQ WHERE N.NOTICE_SEQ = #{notice_seq}

SELECT NOTICE_SEQ , NOTICE_TITLE , NOTICE_CONT , CRT_DTM , ACTIVE , NOTICE_PRIORITY , VIEW_COUNT FROM notice WHERE 1=1
AND ACTIVE = (#{status} = 'true')
AND NOTICE_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY NOTICE_PRIORITY DESC, CRT_DTM DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notice WHERE ACTIVE = TRUE
AND NOTICE_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')

SELECT t.trade_seq, t.member_seller_seq, t.member_buyer_seq, seller.member_nicknm AS member_seller_nm, buyer.member_nicknm AS member_buyer_nm, t.sale_title, t.sale_price, t.delivery_cost, t.book_title, t.sale_st_dtm FROM sb_trade_info t LEFT JOIN member_info seller ON t.member_seller_seq = seller.member_seq LEFT JOIN member_info buyer ON t.member_buyer_seq = buyer.member_seq WHERE t.payment_type = 'tosspay' AND t.safe_payment_st = 'COMPLETED' AND t.confirm_purchase = true
AND ( t.sale_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR t.book_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR t.member_seller_seq IN ( SELECT member_seq FROM member_info WHERE member_nicknm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) OR t.member_buyer_seq IN ( SELECT member_seq FROM member_info WHERE member_nicknm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) )
AND t.sale_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND t.book_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND t.member_seller_seq IN ( SELECT member_seq FROM member_info WHERE member_nicknm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND t.member_buyer_seq IN ( SELECT member_seq FROM member_info WHERE member_nicknm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY t.sale_st_dtm DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sb_trade_info WHERE payment_type = 'tosspay' AND safe_payment_st = 'COMPLETED' AND confirm_purchase = true
AND ( sale_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR book_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR member_seller_seq IN ( SELECT member_seq FROM member_info WHERE member_nicknm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) OR member_buyer_seq IN ( SELECT member_seq FROM member_info WHERE member_nicknm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) )
AND sale_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND book_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND member_seller_seq IN ( SELECT member_seq FROM member_info WHERE member_nicknm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND member_buyer_seq IN ( SELECT member_seq FROM member_info WHERE member_nicknm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
